'''Jowir Ar'Lensa''' was a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] from [[Wayfar/Legends|Wayfar]], [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. He ran a small stand in the town, but dealt only with [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] and those who worked with the crime lord. He hated [[Valarian/Legends|Valarian]] very much, and often hired people to slay her men.

==Behind the scenes==
Jowir Ar'Lensa appeared as a non-player character in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online role-playing game developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].
